Coming into Thursday trading, Tesla stock has risen five of the past six days, gaining more than 14% over that span.  With CEO Elon Musk traveling with President Donald Trump in China, optimism about Tesla Full Self-Driving (FSD) approval in that country seems to be the main stock driver lately.
